fallback.note: Use call_bridge_tool when direct MCP discovery lags; the target tool's normal safety gates still apply.

tools.name: foundry_status
tools.title: Foundry status
tools.description: Report Foundry runtime status, bridge daemon state, and active GM session metadata.

tools.name: bridge_self_check
tools.title: Bridge self check
tools.description: Run a read-only bridge health check with diagnostics and actionable next steps.

tools.name: list_bridge_tools
tools.title: List bridge tools
tools.description: List bridge tool metadata, risk flags, and registry checksum.

tools.name: call_bridge_tool
tools.title: Call bridge tool
tools.description: Fallback dispatcher for invoking any registered bridge tool when direct MCP discovery lags.

tools.name: list_collections
tools.title: List Foundry collections
tools.description: List live Foundry world collections from the connected GM session.

tools.name: get_document
tools.title: Get Foundry document
tools.description: Read a Foundry document by collection and id or name.

tools.name: search_documents
tools.title: Search Foundry documents
tools.description: Search live documents in a collection.

tools.name: list_scenes
tools.title: List scenes
tools.description: List scenes in the active world.

tools.name: inspect_scene
tools.title: Inspect scene
tools.description: Read a scene including embedded scene documents.

tools.name: list_compendium_packs
tools.title: List compendium packs
tools.description: List live Foundry compendium packs with compact metadata.

tools.name: search_compendium
tools.title: Search compendium
tools.description: Search live Foundry compendium indexes without scraping pack storage files.

tools.name: get_compendium_document
tools.title: Get compendium document
tools.description: Read or summarize a single document from a live Foundry compendium pack.

tools.name: summarize_actor
tools.title: Summarize actor
tools.description: Return a compact D35E-oriented summary of a live world actor.

tools.name: summarize_scene
tools.title: Summarize scene
tools.description: Return a compact summary of a live scene and optional token details.

tools.name: summarize_world_index
tools.title: Summarize world index
tools.description: Return compact live-world counts, active scene state, users, compendium packs, runtime health, and optional samples.

tools.name: search_world
tools.title: Search world
tools.description: Search across live world collections and return compact stable-id results.

tools.name: audit_scene_readiness
tools.title: Audit scene readiness
tools.description: Read-only scene readiness audit for assets, linked actors, token state, grid, background, and scene document counts.

tools.name: audit_actor_readiness
tools.title: Audit actor readiness
tools.description: Read-only actor readiness audit for images, token linkage, ownership, item gaps, and D35E summary availability.

tools.name: list_users
tools.title: List users
tools.description: List Foundry users from the live world with sensitive fields redacted.

tools.name: read_settings
tools.title: Read settings
tools.description: Read live Foundry settings with sensitive fields redacted.

tools.name: tail_logs
tools.title: Tail Foundry logs
tools.description: Read recent Foundry log lines from local log files with secret-like fields redacted.

tools.name: get_runtime_events
tools.title: Get runtime events
tools.description: Read recent live GM-client runtime warnings, errors, notifications, and bridge request failures.

tools.name: get_runtime_timeline
tools.title: Get runtime timeline
tools.description: Read a bounded in-memory live-session timeline of runtime events, bridge requests, chat, scene, combat, and user activity.

tools.name: clear_runtime_events
tools.title: Clear runtime events
tools.description: Clear the live GM-client runtime event buffer.

tools.name: export_world_snapshot
tools.title: Export world snapshot
tools.description: Create a sanitized live snapshot of collections and basic server metadata.

tools.name: create_document
tools.title: Create document
tools.description: Create a Foundry world document through the live GM session.

tools.name: update_document
tools.title: Update document
tools.description: Update a Foundry world document through the live GM session.

tools.name: delete_document
tools.title: Delete document
tools.description: Delete a Foundry world document after creating a local backup.

tools.name: create_embedded_document
tools.title: Create embedded document
tools.description: Create an embedded Foundry document such as a TokenDocument on a Scene.

tools.name: update_embedded_document
tools.title: Update embedded document
tools.description: Update an embedded Foundry document such as a TokenDocument on a Scene.

tools.name: delete_embedded_document
tools.title: Delete embedded document
tools.description: Delete an embedded Foundry document after creating a local backup.

tools.name: create_chat_message
tools.title: Create chat message
tools.description: Create a chat message in the active world.

tools.name: run_macro
tools.title: Run macro
tools.description: Run a Foundry macro by id or name through the GM session.

tools.name: run_gm_script
tools.title: Run GM script
tools.description: Run explicit JavaScript in the live GM client. Requires dangerous=true.

tools.name: list_installed_packages
tools.title: List installed packages
tools.description: List installed local systems, modules, and worlds from Foundry data.

tools.name: read_foundry_options_sanitized
tools.title: Read sanitized Foundry options
tools.description: Read Foundry options.json with secrets redacted.

tools.name: list_trusted_worlds
tools.title: List trusted worlds
tools.description: List Foundry worlds authorized to connect through this local bridge.

tools.name: restart_foundry_world
tools.title: Restart Foundry world
tools.description: Fully restart the local Foundry app, launch an explicit world, join as GM, and verify bridge readiness.

tools.name: revoke_trusted_world
tools.title: Revoke trusted world
tools.description: Remove a Foundry world from the local bridge trusted-world list.

tools.name: backup_world
tools.title: Backup world
tools.description: Copy the active world directory to the bridge backup folder.

tools.name: install_or_update_bridge_module
tools.title: Install or update bridge module
tools.description: Copy the bridge Foundry module into the local Foundry modules directory.
